title: oxypetalum lanatum
intro: Oxypetalum lanatum, also known as the hairy or lanate oxypetalum, is a type of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Oxypetalum lanatum is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used as a tincture or added to herbal supplements.
